title: Grid Items
content:
### Grid Items

Properties that control **individual grid items** placement.

---

### Item Properties

| Property | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `grid-column` | Shorthand for column start/end |
| `grid-row` | Shorthand for row start/end |
| `grid-area` | Assign to named area or shorthand for all lines |
| `justify-self` | Horizontal alignment within cell |
| `align-self` | Vertical alignment within cell |
| `place-self` | Shorthand for justify-self + align-self |
| `order` | Reorder items (default 0) |

---

### Grid Lines

Each grid has numbered lines:

```
1      2      3      4   (column lines)
+------+------+------+
|      |      |      | 1  (row lines)
+------+------+------+
|      |      |      | 2
+------+------+------+
|      |      |      | 3
+------+------+------+
                     4
```

---

### Placing Items by Lines

```css
.item {
  grid-column: 1 / 3;  /* Start at line 1, end at line 3 */
  grid-row: 1 / 2;     /* Start at line 1, end at line 2 */
}
```

---

### Span Syntax

```css
.item {
  grid-column: 1 / span 2;  /* Start at 1, span 2 columns */
  grid-row: span 2;         /* Span 2 rows from auto-placement */
}
```

---

### Shorthand grid-column / grid-row

```css
.item {
  grid-column: 1 / 3;     /* Column 1 to 3 */
  grid-column: 1 / -1;    /* From first to last line */
  grid-row: 2 / 4;        /* Row 2 to 4 */
}
```

---

### Align Self / Justify Self

```css
.item {
  justify-self: start;    /* Left of cell */
  justify-self: center;   /* Center horizontally */
  justify-self: end;      /* Right of cell */
  justify-self: stretch;  /* Fill cell width (default) */
  
  align-self: start;      /* Top of cell */
  align-self: center;     /* Center vertically */
  align-self: end;        /* Bottom of cell */
  align-self: stretch;    /* Fill cell height (default) */
}
```

---

### Place Self (Shorthand)

```css
/* align-self justify-self */
place-self: center stretch;
place-self: center;  /* Both center */
```

---

### Overlapping Items

```css
.item-a {
  grid-column: 1 / 3;
  grid-row: 1 / 3;
}

.item-b {
  grid-column: 2 / 4;
  grid-row: 2 / 4;
  /* Overlaps with item-a */
  z-index: 1;
}
```

> **Key Point:** Grid lines start at 1, not 0. `-1` refers to the last line.
codeExample:
Spans columns 1-3
Normal
Normal
Full width
Normal

quiz.question: What does grid-column: 1 / -1 do?
options: Spans from first to last column
